Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# Load traces for different models at different batch sizes
traces_to_analyze = [
    \("C:\\\\Users\\\\Zhiru\\\\research\\\\openg2g\\\\data\\\\offline\\\\ebac1d5c03f752d2\\\\traces\\\\Llama-3.1-8B_num_gpus_1_max_num_seqs_8.csv", "8B", 1, 8\),
    \("C:\\\\Users\\\\Zhiru\\\\research\\\\openg2g\\\\data\\\\offline\\\\ebac1d5c03f752d2\\\\traces\\\\Llama-3.1-8B_num_gpus_1_max_num_seqs_128.csv", "8B", 1, 128\),
    \("C:\\\\Users\\\\Zhiru\\\\research\\\\openg2g\\\\data\\\\offline\\\\ebac1d5c03f752d2\\\\traces\\\\Llama-3.1-70B_num_gpus_4_max_num_seqs_8.csv", "70B", 4, 8\),
    \("C:\\\\Users\\\\Zhiru\\\\research\\\\openg2g\\\\data\\\\offline\\\\ebac1d5c03f752d2\\\\traces\\\\Llama-3.1-70B_num_gpus_4_max_num_seqs_128.csv", "70B", 4, 128\),
]

print\("=" * 80\)
print\("PER-GPU POWER ANALYSIS"\)
print\("=" * 80\)

for trace_path, model, num_gpus, batch_size in traces_to_analyze:
    try:
        df = pd.read_csv\(trace_path\)
        total_power = df['power_total_W'].values
        per_gpu_power = total_power / num_gpus
        
        print\(f"\\n{model} @ Batch {batch_size} \({num_gpus} GPUs\):"\)
        print\(f"  Total power: min={total_power.min\(\):.1f}W, mean={total_power.mean\(\):.1f}W, max={total_power.max\(\):.1f}W"\)
        print\(f"  Per-GPU power: min={per_gpu_power.min\(\):.1f}W, mean={per_gpu_power.mean\(\):.1f}W, max={per_gpu_power.max\(\):.1f}W"\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f"Error reading {trace_path}: {e}"\)

print\("\\n" + "=" * 80\)
print\("POWER CHANGE \(8 -> 128 batch\)"\)
print\("=" * 80\)

# 8B model
df_8b_8 = pd.read_csv\("C:\\\\Users\\\\Zhiru\\\\research\\\\openg2g\\\\data\\\\offline\\\\ebac1d5c03f752d2\\\\traces\\\\Llama-3.1-8B_num_gpus_1_max_num_seqs_8.csv"\)
df_8b_128 = pd.read_csv\("C:\\\\Users\\\\Zhiru\\\\research\\\\openg2g\\\\data\\\\offline\\\\ebac1d5c03f752d2\\\\traces\\\\Llama-3.1-8B_num_gpus_1_max_num_seqs_128.csv"\)
power_change_8b = df_8b_128['power_total_W'].mean\(\) - df_8b_8['power_total_W'].mean\(\)
power_pct_8b = 100 * power_change_8b / df_8b_8['power_total_W'].mean\(\)

# 70B model  
df_70b_8 = pd.read_csv\("C:\\\\Users\\\\Zhiru\\\\research\\\\openg2g\\\\data\\\\offline\\\\ebac1d5c03f752d2\\\\traces\\\\Llama-3.1-70B_num_gpus_4_max_num_seqs_8.csv"\)
df_70b_128 = pd.read_csv\("C:\\\\Users\\\\Zhiru\\\\research\\\\openg2g\\\\data\\\\offline\\\\ebac1d5c03f752d2\\\\traces\\\\Llama-3.1-70B_num_gpus_4_max_num_seqs_128.csv"\)
power_change_70b_total = df_70b_128['power_total_W'].mean\(\) - df_70b_8['power_total_W'].mean\(\)
power_change_70b_per_gpu = power_change_70b_total / 4
power_pct_70b = 100 * power_change_70b_total / df_70b_8['power_total_W'].mean\(\)

print\(f"\\n8B \(1 GPU\):"\)
print\(f"  Batch 8:   {df_8b_8['power_total_W'].mean\(\):.1f}W"\)
print\(f"  Batch 128: {df_8b_128['power_total_W'].mean\(\):.1f}W"\)
print\(f"  Change: +{power_change_8b:.1f}W \({power_pct_8b:+.1f}%\)"\)

print\(f"\\n70B \(4 GPUs, total\):"\)
print\(f"  Batch 8:   {df_70b_8['power_total_W'].mean\(\):.1f}W"\)
print\(f"  Batch 128: {df_70b_128['power_total_W'].mean\(\):.1f}W"\)
print\(f"  Change: +{power_change_70b_total:.1f}W \({power_pct_70b:+.1f}%\)"\)

print\(f"\\n70B \(per GPU\):"\)
print\(f"  Batch 8:   {df_70b_8['power_total_W'].mean\(\)/4:.1f}W"\)
print\(f"  Batch 128: {df_70b_128['power_total_W'].mean\(\)/4:.1f}W"\)
print\(f"  Change: +{power_change_70b_per_gpu:.1f}W per GPU"\)

print\("\\n" + "=" * 80\)
print\("INSIGHT: Power sensitivity to batch size"\)
print\("=" * 80\)
print\(f"\\n8B:  {abs\(power_pct_8b\):.1f}% power change from batch 8->128"\)
print\(f"70B: {abs\(power_pct_70b\):.1f}% power change from batch 8->128"\)
print\(f"\\nRatio of power sensitivity: 8B is {abs\(power_pct_8b\)/abs\(power_pct_70b\):.2f}x as sensitive to batch changes"\)

EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# Load traces for different models at different batch sizes
traces_to_analyze = [
    \("data/offline/ebac1d5c03f752d2/traces/Llama-3.1-8B_num_gpus_1_max_num_seqs_8.csv", "8B", 1, 8\),
    \("data/offline/ebac1d5c03f752d2/traces/Llama-3.1-8B_num_gpus_1_max_num_seqs_128.csv", "8B", 1, 128\),
    \("data/offline/ebac1d5c03f752d2/traces/Llama-3.1-70B_num_gpus_4_max_num_seqs_8.csv", "70B", 4, 8\),
    \("data/offline/ebac1d5c03f752d2/traces/Llama-3.1-70B_num_gpus_4_max_num_seqs_128.csv", "70B", 4, 128\),
]

print\("=" * 80\)
print\("PER-GPU POWER ANALYSIS"\)
print\("=" * 80\)

for trace_path, model, num_gpus, batch_size in traces_to_analyze:
    try:
        df = pd.read_csv\(trace_path\)
        total_power = df['power_total_W'].values
        per_gpu_power = total_power / num_gpus
        
        print\(f"\\n{model} @ Batch {batch_size} \({num_gpus} GPUs\):"\)
        print\(f"  Total power: min={total_power.min\(\):.1f}W, mean={total_power.mean\(\):.1f}W, max={total_power.max\(\):.1f}W"\)
        print\(f"  Per-GPU power: min={per_gpu_power.min\(\):.1f}W, mean={per_gpu_power.mean\(\):.1f}W, max={per_gpu_power.max\(\):.1f}W"\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f"Error reading {trace_path}: {e}"\)

print\("\\n" + "=" * 80\)
print\("POWER CHANGE \(8 -> 128 batch\)"\)
print\("=" * 80\)

# 8B model
df_8b_8 = pd.read_csv\("data/offline/ebac1d5c03f752d2/traces/Llama-3.1-8B_num_gpus_1_max_num_seqs_8.csv"\)
df_8b_128 = pd.read_csv\("data/offline/ebac1d5c03f752d2/traces/Llama-3.1-8B_num_gpus_1_max_num_seqs_128.csv"\)
power_change_8b = df_8b_128['power_total_W'].mean\(\) - df_8b_8['power_total_W'].mean\(\)
power_pct_8b = 100 * power_change_8b / df_8b_8['power_total_W'].mean\(\)

# 70B model  
df_70b_8 = pd.read_csv\("data/offline/ebac1d5c03f752d2/traces/Llama-3.1-70B_num_gpus_4_max_num_seqs_8.csv"\)
df_70b_128 = pd.read_csv\("data/offline/ebac1d5c03f752d2/traces/Llama-3.1-70B_num_gpus_4_max_num_seqs_128.csv"\)
power_change_70b_total = df_70b_128['power_total_W'].mean\(\) - df_70b_8['power_total_W'].mean\(\)
power_change_70b_per_gpu = power_change_70b_total / 4
power_pct_70b = 100 * power_change_70b_total / df_70b_8['power_total_W'].mean\(\)

print\(f"\\n8B \(1 GPU\):"\)
print\(f"  Batch 8:   {df_8b_8['power_total_W'].mean\(\):.1f}W"\)
print\(f"  Batch 128: {df_8b_128['power_total_W'].mean\(\):.1f}W"\)
print\(f"  Change: +{power_change_8b:.1f}W \({power_pct_8b:+.1f}%\)"\)

print\(f"\\n70B \(4 GPUs, total\):"\)
print\(f"  Batch 8:   {df_70b_8['power_total_W'].mean\(\):.1f}W"\)
print\(f"  Batch 128: {df_70b_128['power_total_W'].mean\(\):.1f}W"\)
print\(f"  Change: +{power_change_70b_total:.1f}W \({power_pct_70b:+.1f}%\)"\)

print\(f"\\n70B \(per GPU\):"\)
print\(f"  Batch 8:   {df_70b_8['power_total_W'].mean\(\)/4:.1f}W"\)
print\(f"  Batch 128: {df_70b_128['power_total_W'].mean\(\)/4:.1f}W"\)
print\(f"  Change: +{power_change_70b_per_gpu:.1f}W per GPU"\)

print\("\\n" + "=" * 80\)
print\("INSIGHT: Power sensitivity to batch size"\)
print\("=" * 80\)
print\(f"\\n8B:  {abs\(power_pct_8b\):.1f}% power change from batch 8->128"\)
print\(f"70B: {abs\(power_pct_70b\):.1f}% power change from batch 8->128"\)
print\(f"\\nRatio of power sensitivity: 8B is {abs\(power_pct_8b\)/abs\(power_pct_70b\):.2f}x as sensitive to batch changes"\)

EOF)
